fun_facts.fact: The filmmakers meticulously recreated a bygone era, sourcing authentic props and costumes to lend a rich, historical feel to the inherited palace.
The director drew inspiration from classic Bollywood horror-comedies, aiming for a balance of genuine scares and laugh-out-loud moments.
Several comedic set pieces were filmed with a live audience on set to capture genuine reactions and enhance the timing of the gags.
The team spent weeks scouting for the perfect rural location that could convincingly portray both the grandeur and the unsettling isolation of the ancestral home.
Lead actor [Actor Name] underwent specialized training to handle the film's blend of physical comedy and intense, suspenseful sequences.
The unique sound design plays a crucial role, using subtle auditory cues to build suspense before delivering moments of comedic relief.

first_act_hint: The film opens with a sense of excited anticipation and familial warmth as plans for a joyous wedding are underway. However, beneath the surface of celebration, a subtle unease begins to creep in, hinted at by odd occurrences and the hushed whispers of the local villagers.
